    have h_poly : (X : ℚ[X]) ^ n + X ^ 2 - 1 ∣ X ^ m + X - 1 := by
      refine (Polynomial.infinite_set_dvd_iff (p := (X : ℚ[X]) ^ m + X - 1) (q := (X : ℚ[X]) ^ n + X ^ 2 - 1)).mpr ?_
      obtain ⟨a, ha_pos, ha_dvd⟩ := h.exists_nat_lt 1
      exact ⟨a, ha_pos, by simpa using ha_dvd⟩
    have n_ge_3 : n ≥ 3 := by
      by_contra! hn; interval_cases n
      · simpa using h_poly
      · simpa using h_poly
      · simpa using h_poly
    have m_gt_n : m > n := by
      by_contra! hm; have h_deg : (X ^ m + X - 1 : ℚ[X]).natDegree < (X ^ n + X ^ 2 - 1).natDegree := by
        nlinarith [Polynomial.natDegree_pow_le (X : ℚ[X]) m, Polynomial.natDegree_pow_le (X : ℚ[X]) n]
      exact (Polynomial.not_dvd_of_natDegree_lt (by intro h; simpa using h) h_deg h_poly).elim
    have h_root : (0 : ℚ) < (1 : ℚ) / 2 ∧ (1 : ℚ) / 2 < 1 := by norm_num
    let x := (Classical.choose (IntermediateValueTheorem.univ (f := λ x : ℚ => x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1) (by continuity) (by norm_num; nlinarith) (by norm_num; nlinarith)))
    have hx : x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1 = 0 ∧ 0 < x ∧ x < 1 := (Classical.choose_spec (IntermediateValueTheorem.univ (f := λ x : ℚ => x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1) (by continuity) (by norm_num; nlinarith) (by norm_num; nlinarith)))
    have h_xm : x ^ m + x - 1 = 0 := by simpa [hx.1] using (Polynomial.aeval_congr rfl h_poly).symm
    have h_kn : x ^ (m - n) = 1 / (x + 1) := by
      have : x ^ n = 1 - x ^ 2 := by nlinarith [hx.1]
      have : x ^ m = 1 - x := by nlinarith [h_xm]
      rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt m_gt_n), pow_add, this] at this
      field_simp [hx.2.1, (by nlinarith : x + 1 ≠ 0)]; nlinarith
    have : m = 5 ∧ n = 3 := by
      have h33 : (3 : ℚ) ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2 - 1 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      -- This part of the proof uses the properties of the root x in (0, 1)
      -- established by the polynomial equations x^n + x^2 - 1 = 0 and x^m + x - 1 = 0.
      -- The only pair of integers (m, n) with m, n >= 3 satisfying this is (5, 3).
      sorry
    exact ⟨this.1, this.2⟩
sorry

constructor
  · rintro ⟨hmn⟩
    have h : ∀ a : ℤ, a ^ 3 + a ^ 2 - 1 ∣ a ^ 5 + a - 1 := by
      intro a; use a ^ 2 - a + 1
      ring
    have S_eq : {a : ℤ | 0 < a ∧ a ^ 3 + a ^ 2 - 1 ∣ a ^ 5 + a - 1} = {a : ℤ | 0 < a} := by
      ext a; simp [h a]
    rw [S_eq]
    exact Set.infinite_pos_iff_infinite_nat.mpr Set.infinite_univ
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, r, hr, hdiv⟩ := poly_div (Polynomial.X ^ m + Polynomial.X - 1 : ℤ[X]) (Polynomial.X ^ n + Polynomial.X ^ 2 - 1)
    have hzero : r = 0 := by
      obtain ⟨a, ha_pos, ha_div⟩ := h.exists_nat_lt (r.natDegree + 100)
      have : (a : ℤ) ^ n + (a : ℤ) ^ 2 - 1 ∣ r.eval (a : ℤ) := by
        have := Polynomial.eval_div_iff hdiv a
        exact (ha_div).trans_rev (Polynomial.eval_div_iff hdiv a).symm
      exact Polynomial.eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt_of_infinite_eval_div (Polynomial.X ^ n + Polynomial.X ^ 2 - 1) r ha_pos ha_div
    sorry -- The formal proof of polynomial divisibility and root analysis is long; (5,3) is the only m,n ≥ 3.

rw [solution, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Prod.mk.inj_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    refine Set.Infinite.mono (fun a ha ↦ ?_) (Set.infinite_atTop_inter_Ioi 0)
    · simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_Ioi] at ha ⊢
      use a ^ 2 - a + 1; ring
  · intro h
    have h' : (Polynomial.X ^ n + Polynomial.X ^ 2 - 1 : ℤ[X]) ∣ (Polynomial.X ^ m + Polynomial.X - 1) :=
      Polynomial.dvd_of_at_infinite_points _ _ h
    have root_cond : ∀ {z : ℂ}, z ^ n + z ^ 2 - 1 = 0 → z ^ m + z - 1 = 0 := by
      intro z hz; have := Polynomial.aeval_congr (R := ℤ) (f := Polynomial.X ^ n + Polynomial.X ^ 2 - 1)
      (g := Polynomial.X ^ m + Polynomial.X - 1) h' (x := z); simp [hz] at this; exact this
    have n3 : n = 3 := by
      let f : ℝ → ℝ := fun x ↦ x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1
      have ⟨x, hx0, hx1, hxf⟩ : ∃ x ∈ Set.Ioo 0 1, f x = 0 := by
        refine ⟨_, ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩, ?_⟩; apply exists_root_adjacent_Icc (f := f)
        · exact continuous_from_delay (fun x ↦ x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1)
        · simp [f]; left; norm_num; refine add_le_of_le_sub_left ?_ (by norm_num); exact pow_le_one _ (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      have g_root : x ^ m + x - 1 = 0 := by
        have := root_cond (z := (x : ℂ)); simp at this; exact this
      have x_val : x ^ n = 1 - x ^ 2 ∧ x ^ m = 1 - x := ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
      have x_rel : x ^ n = x ^ m * (1 + x) := by rw [x_val.2]; linarith [x_val.1]
      have k_def : m > n := by
        refine by_contradiction (fun hle ↦ ?_)
        have : x ^ n ≤ x ^ m := pow_le_pow_of_le_one_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (not_lt.1 hle)
        rw [x_rel] at this; nlinarith
      have x_final : x ^ (m - n) * (1 + x) = 1 := by
        rw [← x_rel, ← pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt k_def)]; exact (pow_eq_zero_iff (by linarith)).not.1 (by linarith)
      have m_n_2 : m - n = 2 := by
        let g : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun k y ↦ y ^ k * (1 + y)
        have : g (m - n) x = 1 ∧ g 2 x = 1 := ⟨x_final, by rw [← x_val.1, ← x_val.2]; ring⟩
        by_contra h_diff; apply h_diff; exact Nat.pow_right_injective (by linarith) (by nlinarith)
      rw [← m_n_2, x_final] at x_val; nlinarith
    exact ⟨by nlinarith, n3⟩

constructor
  · rintro (⟨h1, h2⟩ | ⟨h1, h2⟩)
    · simp only [h1, h2, Int.reducePow]
      have h : ∀ a : ℤ, a ^ 3 + a ^ 2 - 1 ∣ a ^ 5 + a - 1 := by
        intro a
        have : a ^ 5 + a - 1 = (a ^ 3 + a ^ 2 - 1) * (a ^ 2 - a + 1) := by ring
        exact ⟨a ^ 2 - a + 1, this⟩
      exact Set.infinite_atTop _ (fun a _ ↦ ⟨a, h a⟩)
    · simp only [h1, h2, pow_one]
      exact Set.infinite_atTop _ (fun a _ ↦ ⟨a, dvd_refl _⟩)
  · intro h
    have h_div : Polynomial.X ^ n + Polynomial.X ^ 2 - 1 ∣ Polynomial.X ^ m + Polynomial.X - 1 := by
      refine Polynomial.dvd_of_rat_root_infinite ?_
      obtain ⟨A, hA_inf, hA_dvd⟩ := h.exists_subset_atTop
      exact Set.Infinite.mono (fun a ha ↦ (hA_dvd a ha).2) hA_inf
    have h_pos_root : ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ x < 1 ∧ x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1 = 0 := by
      have f : ℝ → ℝ := fun x ↦ x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1
      have : Continuous f := by continuity
      have h0 : f 0 = -1 := by simp [f]
      have h1 : f 1 = 1 := by simp [f]
      obtain ⟨x, hx0, hx1, hxf⟩ := intermediate_value_interval h0.le h1.le this
      exact ⟨x, hx0, hx1, hxf⟩
    obtain ⟨x, x_pos, x_lt1, hx⟩ := h_pos_root
    have hx_m : x ^ m + x - 1 = 0 := by
      rw [← Polynomial.aeval_def] at hx ⊢
      exact Polynomial.aeval_eq_zero_of_dvd_aeval h_div hx
    have hx_n : x ^ n = 1 - x ^ 2 := by linarith
    have hx_m2 : x ^ m = 1 - x := by linarith
    have hx_kn : x ^ n = (1 - x) * (1 + x) := by
      rw [hx_n]
      ring
    rw [← hx_m2] at hx_kn
    have hx_diff : x ^ (m - n) = (1 + x)⁻¹ := by
      have : x ≠ 0 := by linarith
      field_simp [hx_kn]
      rw [← pow_sub _ (by linarith [hx_kn, x_lt1, x_pos])] at hx_kn
      · field_simp at hx_kn; linarith
      · exact x_pos
    have hx_final : x ^ (m - n + 1) + x ^ (m - n) - 1 = 0 := by
      field_simp [hx_diff] at hx_diff ⊢
      rw [hx_diff]
      ring
    let k := m - n
    have f_eq : x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1 = x ^ (k + 1) + x ^ k - 1 := by rw [hx, hx_final]
    have n3 : n = 3 ∧ k = 2 ∨ n = k + 1 ∧ 2 = k := by
      have h_unique : ∀ p q : ℕ, p ≥ 1 → q ≥ 1 → ∃! y : ℝ, 0 < y ∧ y < 1 ∧ y ^ p + y ^ q - 1 = 0 := by
        intro p q hp hq
        refine ⟨_, ?_, fun y hy ↦ hy.2.2⟩
        have : StrictMonoOn (fun y ↦ y ^ p + y ^ q - 1) (Set.Ici 0) := by
          refine strictMonoOn_of_deriv_pos (convex_Ici 0) (continuous_at_pow _ |>.add (continuous_at_pow _) |>.sub continuousAt_const) ?_
          intro y hy
          rw [deriv_sub, deriv_add, deriv_pow, deriv_pow, deriv_const]
          · linarith [pow_nonneg (y := p - 1) (inner := y) (by linarith), pow_nonneg (y := q - 1) (inner := y) (by linarith)]
          · exact continuous_at_pow _ |>.add (continuous_at_pow _)
          · exact continuousAt_const
        exact existsUnique_root_of_strictMonoOn_of_continuousOn_of_interval12 (f := fun y ↦ y ^ p + y ^ q - 1) (strictMonoOn := this) (continuousOn := by continuity) (h1 := by simp) (h2 := by simp)
      sorry -- Irreducibility and root arguments
    sorry -- Final cases matching solution set
